title: gomphostemma javanicum var. rugosum
intro: Gomphostemma javanicum var. rugosum, also known as the Java Gomphostemma, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Gomphostemma javanicum var. rugosum are said to include reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and possessing potential anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
